name: SFA Team Performance
query: SELECT u.full_name AS "Salesperson:Data:150", COUNT(v.name) AS "Total Visits:Int:100", SUM(CASE WHEN v.outcome = 'Order Taken' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Successful Orders:Int:120", SUM(CASE WHEN v.outcome = 'No Order' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "No Orders:Int:100", ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN v.outcome = 'Order Taken' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(v.name)) * 100, 2) AS "Conversion Rate (%):Data:120" FROM `tabVisit Log` v LEFT JOIN `tabUser` u ON v.owner = u.email WHERE DATE(v.start_time) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s AND (%(sales_person)s IS NULL OR v.owner = %(sales_person)s) GROUP BY v.owner
